problem_solved: Clinical documentation burden leads to physician burnout, reduced patient face-time, and delayed billing cycles
solution_description: Ambient AI medical scribe that automatically listens to natural patient conversations and produces fully formatted clinical notes. Specializes in oncology with 4 million oncology visits captured per year. Offers specialty-specific AI for longitudinal care
traction_signals: Leading ambient system for cancer care
4 million oncology visits captured per year
Specialty-specific AI for oncology, cardiology, orthopedics
Customizable chart notes with EHR integration
notes: Strong oncology focus with specialty-specific models. Ideal for specialty practices requiring longitudinal care documentation. US-centric but expansion-ready
